docket_entries.description: REQUEST THAT CLERK ENTER JUDGMENT ON FINAL ORDER, DECISION OR AWARD OF THE LABOR COMMISSIONER FILED BY PLAINTIFF XIE, CAI CI AS TO DEFENDANT GARMENT NETWORK INC A CALIFORNIA CORPORATION AKA GN.T. INC. AND TEAMSHOP JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED
